title: Smart Cape Renderer
description: A simple extension for sophisticated backpacks mod that disables cape when wearing backpacks
body:
## About
- Feeling annoyed with the **model clash** when wearing [sophisticated backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) with capes enabled?   
  
- This mod will block the render buffer for capes if player's wearing a backpack. In this way, the model won't stack together and cause model clash.
  
- Compatible with **[Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)/[Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)**
- Neoforge port on the way
